security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:;
